title: Critical: Production API Outage
description: Urgent technical support request — API is down for the customer's production environment. Tests Critical priority + Technical Support category.
subject: URGENT: API returning 500 errors since 2am — production down
body:
Hi support team,

This is urgent. Since 2:00 AM UTC our production environment has been unable to call your API. Every request to https://api.yourservice.com/v1/customers returns a 500 Internal Server Error. We have a customer demo at 9 AM and we cannot work — this is blocking everything.

We tried:
- Reauthenticating with our API key
- Switching to our backup key
- Testing from different regions

All return the same 500 error. This is a P1 incident for us.

Please escalate immediately.

Sarah Chen
Sr. Engineering Lead, Acme Corp
+1 (415) 555-0142
